name: octo-oke-autoscaling-hpa-events
description: Horizontal Pod Autoscaler scale events for the OKE workloads. Surfaces the SuccessfulRescale / FailedRescale / unable-to-fetch-metrics traffic emitted by the HPA controller during a stress-demo run. Time-aligns with APM 'shop scale envelope' saved query (phase 7 plan 07) and the 'HPA at max' Monitoring alarm (phase 7 plan 08).
queryString: 'Log Source' = 'Kubernetes Logs' and Subsystem = 'hpa-controller' | stats count() by hpa_event, deployment, namespace | sort -Time
